name: sketchup-agent-harness
description: Natural language SketchUp modeling harness for Codex CLI. Create, query, validate, and export SketchUp designs through MCP tools and runtime design skills.

interface.shortDescription: Control SketchUp with natural-language design workflows.
interface.longDescription: SketchUp Agent Harness bundles runtime design skills and an MCP server for creating, querying, validating, and exporting SketchUp models from Codex CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use SketchUp Agent Harness to create a 4m x 5m living room.
Use SketchUp Agent Harness to check the current layout for clearance issues.
